evidence_effect: prospective operational-hypothesis semantics only; no conformance result, calibration value, candidate execution, control outcome, branch interpretation, provider selection, or L03 result

authority.ecology_discriminator: repeated costly activity creates a non-static route-local dynamic that causally changes later traversal beyond static trace persistence

global_boundaries.maximum_claim: bounded trail or stigmergic demand pattern

operational_hypotheses.name: costly_attributable_repeated_formation
operational_hypotheses.proposition: At least two temporally distinguishable attributable native formation transfers debit registered source s_e, credit route-local carrier m_e, and retain nonzero formation cost and lineage without hidden result state.
required_relations: source debit equals packet amount equals carrier credit
at least two accepted formation events
event and cost provenance retained
producer omission cannot fabricate formation
supports_if_resolved: formation component of the L03 causal chain
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: free installation, one event, unattributed activity, or outcome-authored formation remains below R01 or invalid

operational_hypotheses.name: route_local_persistent_carrier
operational_hypotheses.proposition: After formation stops, m_e retains a route-local carrier state through a registered later checkpoint and the state is neither a private message nor a route-choice label.
required_relations: carrier remains on the registered route-local role
state is externally restorable and independently addressable
route and participant labels are excluded from field payload
cannot_support: L03 ecology discriminator without OP-03 through OP-05
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: nonpersistent or private state classifies the carrier boundary; persistence alone remains an inherited trace-only result

operational_hypotheses.name: conservative_non_static_export_lifecycle
operational_hypotheses.proposition: After the repetition floor, serialized internal lifecycle opportunities can produce at least one positive conservative m_e-to-d_e export before terminal floor stability, changing route-local carrier state without destroying global coherence.
required_relations: at least two serialized lifecycle opportunities
positive export has q=min(q_cap,max(0,C(m_e)-C_floor))
carrier debit equals packet amount equals isolated-reservoir credit
eligible-zero, invalid, and duplicate outcomes remain distinct
global node-plus-packet coherence is conserved
supports_if_resolved: non-static decaying or reinforced component of AE01-L03-R02
cannot_support: route effect without OP-04 and OP-05
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: only static persistence, immediate eligible-zero, invalid lifecycle, or missing producer surface closes below the non-static boundary with its exact classification

operational_hypotheses.name: fixed_local_native_encounter
operational_hypotheses.proposition: A prospectively fixed branch-local m_e-to-x_e request encounters current carrier coherence without field-reading adapter logic, and native LGRC9V3 alone determines admission or exact insufficient-source-coherence refusal.
required_relations: request amount and endpoints freeze before field observation
adapter reads no field, history, other route, label, rank, or outcome
mu=C(m_e)-q_probe remains analysis-only
admission and refusal are native and conservation-safe
invalid infrastructure failure remains separate
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: field-reading or route-selecting production invalidates the encounter; same-side or narrow margins remain interpretable rather than automatic failure

operational_hypotheses.name: dynamic_to_encounter_causal_mediation
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Intervening on the B-R export lifecycle or current carrier changes the later registered encounter relation while reservoir state and hidden selection remain noncausal.
required_relations: lifecycle enabled versus omitted or frozen
registered export-source C(m_e) clamp
reservoir C(d_e) clamp with no encounter effect
same fixed local request and matched later opportunity
retained margin and typed native disposition
supports_if_resolved: AE01-L03-R03 when OP-01 through OP-04 also resolve
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: no effect, reservoir dependence, or invalid clamp distinguishes static/generic, misfactored, or missing-surface outcomes

operational_hypotheses.name: formation_quantity_temporal_discriminator
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Repeated formation and one pulse with equal total formation transfer are compared without presuming equal complete current state or a directional result.
required_relations: equal total formation transfer, debit, and declared cost
different event cardinality or temporal distribution
separate complete-state audit at the later checkpoint
supports_if_resolved: classification of temporal formation structure versus accumulated quantity
cannot_support: active-history dependence without OP-08 state matching
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: equality may show current quantity suffices; difference with unequal current state remains a temporal/quantity observation rather than history evidence

operational_hypotheses.name: export_mass_organization_discriminator
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Candidate export with Delta M=-q and Delta O=-q is compared with conserved matched removal having Delta M=-q and Delta O=0 under the same later opportunity.
required_relations: equal total route-mass removal
candidate and control organization contrast retained separately
availability bounds and isolated destinations
no destroyed or hidden coherence
supports_if_resolved: AE01-L03-R04 when the complete control family resolves
cannot_support: organization specificity if the control reproduces the candidate relation
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: control reproduction supports a generic mass-loss interpretation rather than forced rejection; invalid matching blocks the discriminator

operational_hypotheses.name: complete_state_history_discriminator
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Different attributable formation histories with equal causal-continuation projection and identical future inputs produce equal future lifecycle and encounter trajectories if current composite state is sufficient.
required_relations: each arm restores exactly to itself
causal-continuation projections match
future receipts, schedules, opportunities, and probes match
audit lineage is unread by runtime and producers
supports_if_resolved: current-composite-state sufficiency at the tested boundary
cannot_support: costly formation in a false-installed arm
active history when the match is incomplete
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: verified divergence reopens active history or missing state; omitted state or hidden audit reads invalidate the contrast; inability to match is a restoration limitation

operational_hypotheses.name: field_locality_relocation_and_permutation
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Moving complete registered current carrier and continuation state between matched route roles moves the encounter relation, while route labels and role-preserving raw-ID permutations do not change it.
required_relations: complete current-state relocation with no label payload
matched route topology and future opportunity
role-preserving node and edge permutation
reservoir remains isolated
supports_if_resolved: shuffle or relocation component of AE01-L03-R04
cannot_support: active-history relocation unless causal history is separately registered
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: label tracking indicates hidden routing; inability to relocate exposes a control or restoration surface limitation

operational_hypotheses.name: withdrawal_false_trace_and_producer_dependence
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Formation withdrawal, false installation through the declared field interface, static/no-export, and producer-omission branches remain distinct and classify which relation is carried by formation, current state, or producer residue.
required_relations: activity with deposition disabled
false trace installed without depositor history and without outcome write
static or no-export branch
B-R producer omitted or neutralized
same later opportunity class
cannot_support: native expression when producer omission removes the relation
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: false-trace success may support state sufficiency but not formation; producer dependence is a valid bounded result and naturalization debt

operational_hypotheses.name: fixed_route_hidden_router_and_participant_exclusion
operational_hypotheses.proposition: Every route receives a prospectively fixed independent branch-local opportunity, and participant identity, route labels, other-route state, and global rank cannot select the request or outcome.
required_relations: independent route branches from matched complete checkpoints
no simultaneous selector or shared comparison queue
participant identity retained only for audit and eligibility
fixed-route and label-permutation controls
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: any state-aware route selection invalidates the B-R local-encounter interpretation

operational_hypotheses.name: geometry_or_internal_timescale_variation
operational_hypotheses.proposition: One preregistered geometry or system-internal timescale variation tests whether the complete B-R causal relation persists, changes, narrows, or disappears without predetermining direction.
required_relations: one geometry or internal-timescale axis selected before candidate execution
same operational hypothesis family and claim boundary
registered held-fixed structure and changed axis
branch-local metrics and resolution retained
supports_if_resolved: AE01-L03-R05 when lower rungs and the variation relation resolve
cannot_support: R05 from participant or susceptibility variation alone
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: narrow, mixed, or absent transfer remains a stability/regime classification rather than an automatic terminal rejection

operational_hypotheses.name: trail_and_stigmergic_interpretation_boundary
operational_hypotheses.proposition: A route-local field effect may receive trail_field_candidate, while stigmergic_field_candidate additionally requires one participant's attributable formation to alter another eligible non-addressed participant's later activity.
required_relations: trail relation references OP-01 through OP-11 as applicable
stronger tag uses a fresh nondepositor participant
identity, direct-address exclusion, and same access class resolve independently
cannot_support: communication, coordination, learning, colony, or agency claims
operational_hypotheses.failure_or_redirect: same-participant evidence remains eligible only for trail_field_candidate; neither tag is mandatory for a valid negative or missing-surface closeout

conformance_handoff.allowed_effect: interface, ownership, serialization, operation-order, refusal, restoration, and hypothesis-addressability evidence only

reopening_conditions: an operational hypothesis cannot be addressed without changing DEC-027 through DEC-032
the projection silently requires a primary metric or numeric direction before I04
a control cannot distinguish the intended causal relation from generic quantity, route, or producer effects
bounded conformance reveals an omitted operation, state, refusal, restoration, or hidden-router boundary
the parent L03 hypothesis or post-R3 discriminator cannot be represented by the B-R realization
new graph evidence changes the admitted B-R provider contract
